name: geoguessrtips
description: ジオゲッサーのめもを記録するリポジトリ。[GeoGuessrのめも](https://geopinning.space/)のソースコードと画像です。

scripts.dev: node scripts/copy-content-assets.js && node scripts/clean-cache.js && astro dev
scripts.build: node scripts/copy-content-assets.js && astro build && npx pagefind --site dist
scripts.install-hooks: git config core.hooksPath scripts/hooks && echo "Hooks installed (core.hooksPath=scripts/hooks). Use 'git commit --no-verify' to bypass."
scripts.postinstall: node -e "try { require('child_process').execSync('git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree', { stdio: 'ignore' }); require('child_process').execSync('git config core.hooksPath scripts/hooks', { stdio: 'inherit' }); console.log('[postinstall] git hooks path set to scripts/hooks'); } catch (e) {}"
